records.system_name: BARRIER Hip and Knee Arthroplasty Drape
records.source_document: BARRIER Orthopaedic Drapes product page — Molnlycke
records.notes: Sterile single-use orthopaedic drape. Drisite Plus fluid handling: three zones — dry barrier (patched area), strong barrier (tough drapeable laminate), absorbent barrier. Integrated adhesive edges for surgical site fixation and micro-organism migration prevention. Prevents microbial transfer and strike-through. Available for hip, knee, and shoulder replacement procedures.

records.source_document: BARRIER Extremity Drapes product page — Molnlycke
records.notes: Sterile single-use extremity draping set for hand, foot, and lower limb procedures. Drisite Plus absorption. Sterile pack. Product code variant: 60204.

records.source_document: BARRIER Vertical Isolation Drape — Molnlycke
records.notes: Vertical isolation draping for orthopaedic procedures. Creates sterile barrier between sterile and non-sterile field. Product code variant: 80008032.

records.source_document: Molnlycke procedure trays product page
records.notes: Customised ProcedurePak trays containing all single-use equipment for hip, knee, and shoulder replacement. Contents configured per procedure and institution. Can include BARRIER drapes, instruments, and other consumables. Reduces preparation time and waste. Streamlines scrub nurse setup.

records.source_document: Biogel PI OrthoPro product page — Molnlycke
records.notes: Thickest synthetic surgical glove in Biogel range. Brown colour to reduce glare in orthopaedic field. Extra-durable for orthopaedic procedures involving implants, instruments, and bone. Biogel coating for wet donning. Powder-free. Sizes 5.5–9.0. Sterile.

records.source_document: Biogel PI product page — Molnlycke
records.notes: Thick and durable synthetic glove. Biogel coating for easy wet donning. Powder-free. Sizes 5.5–9.0. Standard orthopaedic and general surgical use.

records.source_document: Biogel Indicator Underglove product page — Molnlycke US
records.notes: Green latex underglove for puncture detection system. Worn beneath outer surgical glove. Puncture indicated by green colour visible through outer glove. Used in double-gloving protocols — standard in orthopaedic arthroplasty and implant surgery to reduce blood-borne pathogen exposure.

records.source_document: 3M Ioban 2 Antimicrobial Incise Drape 6600 Series — Solventum
records.notes: Iodine-impregnated adhesive film drape. Broad-spectrum antimicrobial at incision edge throughout surgery. Proven against MRSA in ex vivo human skin (6 hr contact). EZ Delivery design for easy application. Not made with natural rubber latex. Product code: 6640EZ — overall dimensions 23x23 in, incise area 13x13 in. Also: 6650EZ — 17x23 in. Steri-Drape Pouch variant with Ioban film (#6658): 30x30 in.

records.source_document: 3M Steri-Drape product listing — Solventum
records.notes: Non-antimicrobial incise film drape for sterile field coverage. Model 2040: incise area 28x41 cm (11x16 in). Model 2045: incise area 50x45 cm (19.6x17.6 in). Sterile, single-use. EZ Delivery system.

records.source_document: Coated VICRYL suture — Ethicon EMEA
records.notes: Synthetic absorbable braided suture. Composition: 90% glycolide + 10% L-lactide copolymer. Tissue support 2–4 weeks. Available dyed (violet) and undyed. Multiple sizes (USP 2-0 through fine ophthalmic) and needle configurations. Indicated for soft tissue approximation, orthopaedic closures, general surgery, ophthalmic surgery. Also available: Coated VICRYL Plus (with Triclosan antibacterial).

records.source_document: PDS II suture — J&J MedTech US
records.notes: Synthetic absorbable monofilament suture. Material: Polydioxanone (PDO). Absorption: 182–238 days. Strength retention: 80% at 14 days (sizes 3-0+), 60% at 14 days (sizes 4-0-); 40% at 28 days (sizes 3-0+). Extended wound support up to 6 weeks. Clear and violet colour options. Sizes: 2-0, 3-0, 4-0. Needle types: FS-1, PS-2, CP-1 (19–36 mm). Deep tissue approximation in orthopaedic closures; fascial repair. Also available: MONOCRYL Plus Antibacterial with Triclosan.

records.source_document: MONOCRYL suture — Ethicon EMEA
records.notes: Monofilament synthetic absorbable suture. Material: copolymer of glycolide and epsilon-caprolactone (poliglecaprone 25). Faster absorption than PDS. Soft tissue approximation and ligation. Smooth tissue passage. Also available as MONOCRYL Plus Antibacterial with Triclosan (max 2360 ug/m). Subcuticular skin closure standard in orthopaedic procedures.

records.system_name: Stryker Simplex P Radiopaque Bone Cement
records.source_document: Stryker bone cements product page
records.notes: PMMA bone cement — No. 1 selling in USA with 40+ years clinical use. Composition: 75% MMA-styrene copolymer, 15% PMMA, 10% Barium Sulfate (radiopaque). Full dose: 40 g powder + 20 mL monomer. Proven high fatigue, compressive and flexural strengths, low creep. Barium Sulfate allows post-op radiological verification of cement and implant position. Also available: Simplex P with Tobramycin antibiotic cement.

records.source_document: Zimmer Biomet bone cement solutions page
records.notes: High viscosity PMMA bone cement with 50+ years clinical use. Distinctive green colour for contrast against bone and tissue. Short dough time (30 sec), long working time. Excellent fatigue strength vs commercial competitors. Available variants: PALACOS R (plain), PALACOS R+G (with Gentamicin — broad spectrum gram-positive and gram-negative), PALACOS LV (low viscosity), PALACOS LV+G (low viscosity + Gentamicin). Low viscosity variants for cartridge mixing and long narrow nozzles.

records.source_document: SmartSet Bone Cement — J&J MedTech EMEA
records.notes: High viscosity PMMA bone cement. Launched 2003. Setting time approx 13.5 min at 19 deg C. 40 g dose. No visible cracking after 10 million fatigue cycles (GHV variant). Also available: SmartSet GHV with Gentamicin (fast initial elution, highest cumulative release in first 24 hrs). SmartMix delivery system sold separately. Successor to DePuy CMW Bone Cement family.

records.system_name: Stryker SmartPump Dual Channel Tourniquet System
records.source_document: SmartPump Tourniquet System product page — Stryker
records.notes: Pneumatic tourniquet for temporary limb blood-flow occlusion during extremity surgery. Dual channel supports bilateral limb surgery and Bier Block. Large backlit LCD — displays elapsed time and cuff pressure (mmHg) per channel, independently controlled. 3-sec self-calibration on startup (detects issues with pump, cuff, or tubing). 5-hour internal battery backup (12 V, 2.7 Ah AC primary). Dimensions: 17x10x9 in, 12 lbs. Optional printer for timestamped tourniquet report (adhesive label 2x3 in). Multiple built-in safety checks.

records.source_document: InterPulse Pulsed Lavage System product page — Stryker
records.notes: Battery-powered disposable pulsed lavage for orthopaedic bone bed preparation. Applications: total joint arthroplasty (cemented, press-fit, revision), wound debridement, trauma wound cleansing. Variable speed, trigger lock. High flow tip (efficient bone cleaning) and low splash tip (contamination control). Concurrent suction with soft cone splash shield. Ergonomic design reduces fatigue. Rechargeable battery pack option. 'Spike and shoot' simplicity. Single-use disposable system.

records.source_document: Biogel M product page — Molnlycke
records.notes: General purpose natural rubber latex surgical glove with extra grip for enhanced surface control. Biogel inner coating. Powder-free. Sizes 5.5–9.0. Sterile. Product code variant: 30555.

records.subtype: Natural Rubber Latex Surgical Glove — General
records.source_document: Biogel Surgeons product page — Molnlycke US
records.notes: Sterile powder-free natural rubber latex surgical glove. Excellent barrier protection for general surgical procedures. Biogel coating. Sizes 5.5–9.0. Available in boxes of 40–50 pairs.

records.system_name: 3M Bair Hugger Warming Blanket (Upper / Lower / Full Body)
records.source_document: Bair Hugger temperature management — Solventum
records.notes: Single-use forced-air warming blanket for perioperative temperature management. Used in pre-op, OR, and PACU. Compatible with Bair Hugger warming units (Model 750, Model 775 / 77500). Also compatible with Bair Paws patient gown. Various configurations: upper body, lower body, full body, underbody. Prevents perioperative hypothermia. Used routinely in orthopaedic arthroplasty procedures.
